description: Allow unauthenticated guest users to access rooms without a full account. Room owners control guest access via a state event. Revoking access removes existing guests.

actors.name: Guest User
actors.description: User with a temporary identity not registered as a full account

actors.name: Room Administrator
actors.description: User with power to enable or disable guest access

actors.name: Homeserver
actors.description: Server enforcing the guest access policy

fields.name: room_id
fields.label: Room the guest is attempting to access

fields.name: guest_access
fields.label: Current guest access policy for the room

fields.name: is_guest
fields.label: Flag on the membership event indicating the member is a guest

values.description: Guests may not join this room
Guests are permitted to join and observe the room

transitions.description: Room admin sends a guest access state event enabling guest joins
Room admin revokes guest access; existing guests are kicked

guest_access: Guest access is a local-server concept; federation does not propagate guest identity across servers
A room must have an explicit guest_access state event set to can_join before guests may enter
If no guest_access state event exists the room is treated as having guest access forbidden
Guest membership events carry a kind field set to guest to distinguish them from regular members
When guest access is revoked all existing guest members are immediately removed from the room
Guests may observe messages but their ability to send messages depends on the room's event power levels
Server configuration may disable guest access globally regardless of per-room settings

given: room has a guest_access state event with value can_join
guest_joined.result: Guest user is a member and can receive room messages

given: room admin changes guest_access state event to forbidden
existing guest members are present in the room
guest_access_revoked.result: All existing guests are removed; future guest joins are rejected

any: no guest_access state event exists in the room
guest_access state event is set to forbidden

guest_join_denied.result: Guest join rejected with forbidden error

errors.message: Guest access is not permitted for this room

events.name: guest.joined
events.description: A guest user has joined a room with guest access enabled

events.name: guest.access_revoked
events.description: Guest access was disabled and existing guests were removed

related.reason: Guest join follows the same membership state machine as regular joins
Guest users' ability to send events is constrained by power level thresholds
Guest access policy is stored as a room state event

goals.description: Allow unauthenticated guest users to access rooms without a full account. Room owners control guest access via a state event. Revoking access removes existing guests.

constraints.description: Sensitive fields must be encrypted at rest and never logged in plaintext

human_checkpoints: before transitioning to a terminal state

tradeoffs.reason: access control must enforce least-privilege principle

invariants: sensitive fields are never logged in plaintext
all data access is authenticated and authorized
error messages never expose internal system details
state transitions follow the defined state machine — no illegal transitions
